home.title: Software Studio — Website Management Console
home.description: A central console for managing content, identity, services, products, requests, and users.
home.stageDescription: Manage website content, messages, and settings from one place.

auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to manage the website and content.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Check your credentials and try again.
auth.protectedMessage: You must log in to access the management console.
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your username or email and we will send a password reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: If the account exists, a reset link will be sent to its email address.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your admin account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password updated successfully. You can now log in.
auth.invalidResetToken: The password reset link is invalid or expired.

admin.dashboardDescription: A quick summary of content, project requests, messages, and website status.
admin.foundationNotice: Use the sidebar to manage services, apps, systems, work, messages, and company identity.

table.title: Title
table.name: Name
table.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete this item?
table.mediaPickerDescription: Select an uploaded image or file, or upload a new asset and use it directly in this field.
table.mediaPickerEmptyDescription: Upload a file above or try another search keyword.

services.title: Services Management
services.description: Create, edit, and disable services shown on the public website.

products.title: Systems Management
products.description: Manage software systems and platforms, statuses, and information.

portfolio.title: Work Management
portfolio.description: Manage work items and projects shown on the Work page.

quoteRequests.title: Project Requests
quoteRequests.description: Track project requests, change status and priority, and add notes.

contactMessages.title: Contact Messages
contactMessages.description: Read visitor messages, update status, and add internal notes.

blog.title: Insights Management
blog.description: Manage insights, posts, categories, and publishing status.

staticPages.title: Static Pages
staticPages.description: Manage legal pages and marketing content.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Manage client testimonials and their display order.

faq.title: FAQ Management
faq.description: Manage general, service, and product questions.

media.title: Media Library
media.description: Upload and manage images and downloadable files for the website, apps, and systems.

settings.title: Company Identity
settings.description: Update company name, logo, theme, language, contact details, and SEO.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage management console users and their roles.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: View and manage admin panel notifications.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: View sensitive operations performed in the admin panel.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: View initial event and visit summaries.

emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.description: Manage ready-to-use automatic email texts for project requests, contact messages, support requests, and admin messages.

labels.emptyDescription: Central email templates will appear here after system initialization. Templates are not created or deleted manually from this page.
labels.searchPlaceholder: Search by template name, key, or subject...
labels.noteDescription: This page is only for editing existing official templates. There is no add-new-template or delete-template action because templates are tied to system events such as project requests, contact messages, and support requests.
labels.aiApplied: The AI suggestion was applied to the template. Review the copy, then save changes.
labels.aiHintDescription: Use AI to prepare or improve the template subject and body while preserving the official variables exactly as they are.
labels.managedTemplatesOnly: Fixed centrally managed templates: edit only, no add or delete.

crm.notePlaceholder: Write an internal note about the request...

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Review default roles and management console permissions.

apps.title: Apps Management
apps.description: Manage public apps and utility tools shown on the Apps page.

supportRequests.title: Support Requests
supportRequests.description: Follow up support requests from the Support Center and update status, priority, and internal notes.

home.title: We turn ideas into professional software systems
home.description: A software company specialized in websites, web apps, desktop software, admin panels, and API integrations.
home.whyDescription: We build organized, secure, scalable solutions with a professional centralized design system.
home.ctaDescription: Send your project details and we will review them with a clear, practical direction.

about.title: About us
about.description: A software studio building professional websites, management systems, and scalable digital products.
about.visionBody: To be a trusted technical partner for scalable digital products.
about.missionBody: To deliver software solutions that combine beautiful design with strong architecture.
about.valuesBody: Clarity, quality, security, maintainability, and respect for user experience.

services.title: Services
services.description: Software services for companies that need digital presence, internal systems, and scalable products.
services.empty: No active services are available yet.

products.title: Systems
products.description: Software systems and platforms that can be customized and extended around each project.
products.empty: No systems are published right now.

portfolio.title: Work
portfolio.description: Selected work, projects, and systems prepared for presentation.
portfolio.empty: No work items are published right now.

blog.title: Insights
blog.description: Selected articles and insights about digital products, systems, and user experience.
blog.empty: No insights are published right now.

quote.title: Start Your Software Project
quote.description: Share the project or system you need, and we will turn it into a clear direction for design, architecture, timeline, and cost.
quote.success: Your project request has been sent successfully. We will review it and contact you soon.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Send a direct message or use the available contact details.
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully.

legal.body: This page explains how contact and quote request data is handled and used only for follow-up and service delivery.

system.notFoundDescription: The page you are trying to open is not available.
system.maintenanceDescription: We are improving the experience. Please come back later.

apps.title: Our Apps
apps.description: Public apps and utility tools available for direct use or download, with clear updates and support.

app.detailsDescription: A concise overview of usage, platform, features, and launch or download links.
app.ctaDescription: We can turn your idea into a practical app or utility ready for launch and support.

defaultFeatures.title: Clear user experience
defaultFeatures.description: A simple, direct interface for everyday use.

defaultFeatures.title: Updatable foundation
defaultFeatures.description: A foundation that supports improvements and new releases.

defaultFeatures.title: Support and operation
defaultFeatures.description: Clear support, launch, or download links for users.

defaultFeatures.title: Launch-ready
defaultFeatures.description: Ready to be presented on the company website and managed from the admin panel.

adminApps.title: Apps
adminApps.description: Manage the apps and utility tools shown on the public website.

adminProducts.title: Systems
adminProducts.description: Manage the software systems shown on the public website.

adminServices.title: Services
adminServices.description: Manage public website services from one place.
adminServices.iconHint: Choose a symbolic icon or a small image used in compact service cards.
adminServices.imageHint: The main service image is used in details pages and visual previews.
adminServices.autoSlugNotice: The slug is generated automatically from the title and can be edited manually when needed.

adminPortfolio.title: Portfolio
adminPortfolio.description: Manage projects and case studies shown on the public website.

adminProjectRequests.title: Project requests
adminProjectRequests.description: Receive and manage project requests submitted from the public website.

adminSettingsPage.previewDescription: A quick snapshot of the identity shown to visitors and inside the admin panel.
adminSettingsPage.emptyDescription: Add a short company description to make the public website feel complete and trustworthy.
adminSettingsPage.readinessDescription: These items help the public website look complete and professional.
adminSettingsPage.unsavedNotice: You have unsaved changes. Save the page before leaving.
adminSettingsPage.identityDescription: Name, logo, and core description shown on the public site and admin panel.
adminSettingsPage.contactDescription: Public and support contact details shown to visitors and customers.
adminSettingsPage.socialDescription: Add only the channels you want to show publicly.
adminSettingsPage.seoDescription: Control browser titles, search snippets, and footer text.
adminSettingsPage.appearanceDescription: Control theme, language, and visible homepage sections.
adminSettingsPage.maintenanceDescription: Temporarily hide the public website from visitors while keeping the admin panel available.
adminSettingsPage.maintenanceWarningOn: Visitors will see the maintenance message.
adminSettingsPage.maintenanceWarningOff: The public website is available to visitors.
adminSettingsPage.bottomUnsaved: There are changes waiting to be saved.

adminMediaLibrary.title: Media Library
adminMediaLibrary.description: Upload and manage images and downloadable files for the website, apps, and systems.
adminMediaLibrary.uploadDescription: Upload an image, document, or downloadable file for use across the website.
adminMediaLibrary.searchPlaceholder: Search by file name or alt text...
adminMediaLibrary.emptyDescription: Upload the first file to show it here.
adminMediaLibrary.libraryDescription: Browse files in a clean card layout, then open any file to preview or edit its metadata.

adminContentHub.title: Content Management
adminContentHub.description: A focused hub for managing content and media sections shown on the public website.
adminContentHub.notice: Changes in these sections may appear on the public website depending on publishing status. The media library supports content and is not a standalone area.

sections.servicesDescription: Manage the services that present the company capabilities and core solutions.
sections.appsDescription: Manage apps, direct download links, and related presentation data.
sections.productsDescription: Manage software systems and products shown on the website.
sections.portfolioDescription: Manage projects and case studies that show experience and outcomes.
sections.staticPagesDescription: Edit official pages such as About, Terms, and Privacy.
sections.mediaDescription: Upload and organize images and files used across content.
sections.faqsDescription: Manage frequently asked questions that help visitors understand services before contacting you.

groups.mainDescription: Core sections that present the company services, products, and work.
groups.staticPagesDescription: Standalone official pages such as About, Terms, and Privacy.
groups.faqsDescription: Question-and-answer content that helps visitors before contacting or requesting a service.
groups.supportDescription: A library for images and files used across content sections.

adminCustomersHub.title: Requests & Customers
adminCustomersHub.description: A focused hub for customer requests, messages, support, and testimonials.
adminCustomersHub.notice: Review the most important customer intake areas from one place, then open the relevant section for details.

sections.quoteRequestsDescription: Track project requests submitted from the website and update their status and priority.
sections.contactMessagesDescription: Review contact messages submitted by visitors and respond through the right channel.
sections.supportRequestsDescription: Follow customer support issues and assistance requests until they are clearly resolved.
sections.testimonialsDescription: Manage published testimonials that build visitor trust in services and projects.

adminCommunicationHub.title: Notifications & Communication
adminCommunicationHub.description: A focused hub for platform notifications and official message templates.
adminCommunicationHub.notice: Use this section to send important notifications and manage the messages sent to customers and users.

sections.notificationsDescription: Send and manage platform notifications and important alerts shown inside the admin console.
sections.emailTemplatesDescription: Edit official message templates used for replies and email notifications.

adminAdministrationHub.title: Administration
adminAdministrationHub.description: A focused hub for users, permissions, activity monitoring, and analytics.
adminAdministrationHub.notice: Use this section to control admin access and monitor important activity inside the dashboard.

sections.usersDescription: Manage dashboard accounts, user status, and assigned roles.
sections.rolesDescription: Define roles and permissions that control what each user can do.
sections.auditLogsDescription: Review important admin actions to know who did what and when.
sections.analyticsDescription: Track website usage indicators, requests, and overall activity in a focused view.
